title: Add MeshCore compatibility-local settings stores
description: Follow-up from project-LICHEN-9c4y.12 support-matrix review. If MeshCore app compatibility grows beyond the MVP read-only placeholders, implement compatibility-local persistent stores for SET_ADVERT_NAME, SET_CHANNEL, SET_AUTOADD_CONFIG, SET_DEFAULT_FLOOD_SCOPE, and SET_DEVICE_PIN. Stores must be explicitly separate from native LICHEN identity, OSCORE/link/group/routing state, validate inputs, persist/reset deterministically, and have native_sim tests plus canonical vectors before any support claim changes from unsupported to supported.
notes:
Implemented no-hardware MeshCore compatibility-local settings store slice.

Scope completed:
- Added adapter-local compatibility settings for SET_ADVERT_NAME, SET_CHANNEL slot 0 display record, SET_AUTOADD_CONFIG, SET_DEFAULT_FLOOD_SCOPE set/clear, and SET_DEVICE_PIN.
- Settings are explicit MeshCore compatibility state and do not mutate native LICHEN identity, OSCORE/link/group/routing/radio state.
- Gateway wires settings through the MeshCore BLE adapter and applies accepted PIN values through ble_meshcore_set_passkey(); DEVICE_INFO reports the accepted/default compatibility PIN consistently.
- Secret-bearing SET_CHANNEL payloads are recognized but rejected with ERR_UNSUPPORTED_CMD for both 16-byte and 32-byte secret forms; only zero-secret local display records are stored.
- Default flood set requires a 31-byte NUL-terminated UTF-8 name field with length 1..30 plus 16-byte key; empty payload clears the compatibility-local store.
- Added schema metadata for expect.compat_store and canonical MeshCore vectors for setter OK paths, channel-secret unsupported paths, and default-flood clear.
- Updated MeshCore compatibility docs/smoke docs to describe RAM-only adapter/session retention and the flash-backed persistence follow-up.

Follow-up created:
- project-LICHEN-9c4y.21.1 Add flash-backed MeshCore compatibility settings persistence. This is required for reboot/settings reload/corruption validation and remains separate from this no-hardware in-memory adapter/gateway slice.

Review evidence:
- Initial review pair found default-flood payload shape, persistence overclaim, PIN validation/default-passkey consistency, stale smoke docs, missing fake passkey hook, queue overflow, mutation-before-OK, and PIN rollback issues. Fixed or scoped to project-LICHEN-9c4y.21.1.
- Final review pair found 49-byte channel secret import gap, missing compat_store schema field, missing default-flood clear vector/test, and stale default-flood null description. Fixed all actionable findings.
- Final post-fix review results: one reviewer reported only stale default-flood null vector description; fixed and regenerated. Second reviewer reported no findings.

Local validation:
- PYTHONPATH=python/src python3 test/vectors/generate.py: wrote 5 SCHC, 4 link, 29 Meshtastic, 36 MeshCore vectors.
- git diff --check: pass.
- .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q python/tests/test_vectors.py: 97 passed.
- python/.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q python/tests/test_vectors.py: 97 passed.
- .venv/bin/python -m ruff check test/vectors/generate.py python/tests/test_vectors.py: pass.

EC2 Zephyr validation:
- Instance i-0a848a67a22c8e84b in us-east-2a, EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr, clean validation clone /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-9c4y21-validate.
- Note: instance was launched with minimal user-data because the requested aws-builder-user-data.sh was on the unattached EBS volume; after attach/mount, /mnt/lichen-zephyr/scripts/bootstrap-host.sh and /mnt/lichen-zephyr/env.sh were used successfully.
- Command: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshcore_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshcore_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshcore_codec -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-9c4y21-final4 --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen
- Result: 4 test scenarios / 8 instances selected; 5/8 executed configurations passed, 3 skipped by static filter, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings, 85 test cases executed, 75 skipped, elapsed 105.08s.
- ELF sizes: native_sim meshcore_adapter text=68689 data=653 bss=8826 dec=78168; native_sim meshcore_codec text=38452 data=333 bss=8506 dec=47291; native_sim meshcore_gateway_adapter text=60375 data=666 bss=14630 dec=75671; native_sim meshcore_adapter.identity text=74687 data=721 bss=9184 dec=84592; qemu_x86 meshcore_codec text=73008 data=4816 bss=87508 dec=165332.

close_reason: Completed no-hardware RAM-backed MeshCore compatibility-local settings store slice with vectors, docs, reviews, local checks, and EC2 Twister evidence. Durable flash-backed persistence remains tracked by child project-LICHEN-9c4y.21.1.
